    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    ComputerSystemInfo
    Value object representing the overall computer system.
    ComputerSystemInfo.BaseboardInfo
    Value object for the baseboard/motherboard.
    ComputerSystemInfo.FirmwareInfo
    Value object for system firmware/BIOS.
    ConnectionState
    TCP connection states as defined by RFC 793.
    DeviceStatus
     
    DeviceType
     
    DiskInfo
    Value object representing a physical disk/storage device.
    DiskInfo.PartitionInfo
    Value object for disk partitions.
    DisplayInfo
    Value object representing a display/monitor.
    DnsConfiguration
    Value object representing DNS resolver configuration.
    GraphicsCardInfo
    Value object representing a graphics card.
    InternetProtocolStats
    Value object representing aggregate TCP/UDP protocol statistics.
    ListeningPort
    Value object representing a port that is actively listening for connections.
    MachineId
    Value object representing a stable machine identifier.
    Manufacturer
    Value object representing a hardware manufacturer.
    MemoryInfo
    Value object representing system memory information.
    MemoryInfo.PhysicalMemoryModule
    Value object for individual physical memory sticks/modules.
    NetworkInterfaceInfo
    Value object representing a network interface.
    NetworkRoute
    Value object representing a network routing table entry.
    NetworkSnapshot
    Aggregate value object representing a point-in-time network state capture.
    NonPhysicalMachineException
    NonPhysicalMachineException class.
    OperatingSystemInfo
    Value object representing operating system information.
    OperatingSystemObject
    Sealed interface for core operating system domain objects.
    OSEnvironment
     
    OSException
    OSException class.
    OSHardwareObject
    Sealed interface for all hardware-related operating system value objects.
    OSNetworkObject
    Sealed interface for all network-related operating system value objects.
    PhysicalComputer
    PhysicalComputer class.
    PhysicalComputerId
    PhysicalComputerId class.
    PowerSourceInfo
    Value object representing a power source/battery.
    ProcessorInfo
    Value object representing CPU/Processor information.
    ProcessorInfo.CacheInfo
    Value object for processor cache information.
    ProcessorInfo.CoreTopology
    Value object for individual core topology.
    PublicIpInfo
    Value object representing public IP geolocation information (e.g.
    SerialNumber
    Value object representing a hardware serial number.
    SocketAddress
    Value object representing an IP address and port combination.
    SoundCardInfo
    Value object representing a sound card.
    SshAuthorizedKeys
    Value object representing the contents of an authorized_keys file.
    SshDomainAPI
    Domain service for SSH identity and key management operations.
    SshException
    Domain exception for SSH operations.
    SshException.Reason
     
    SshHost
    Value object representing an SSH remote host target.
    SshIdentity
    Aggregate interface representing an SSH identity — a named key pair and the set of hosts it is authorized on.
    SshKeyAlgorithm
    Supported SSH key algorithms.
    SshKeyGenerationRequest
    Value object representing the parameters for generating a new SSH key pair.
    SshKeyPair
    Value object representing a generated SSH key pair (public + private key material).
    SshPublicKey
    Value object representing an SSH public key.
    SystemSnapshot
    Aggregate value object representing a complete system hardware snapshot.
    TcpConnection
    Value object representing an active TCP connection.
    TransportProtocol
    Transport-layer protocol type.
    UdpConnection
    Value object representing a UDP listener/endpoint.
    UsbDeviceInfo
    Value object representing a USB device.
